findings.summary: Monorepo has 22 packages, framework versions: Effect 4.0.0-beta.66, SolidJS 1.9.10, Electron 41.2.1, Bun 1.3.14. Key import aliases: @/* for packages/opencode/src/, @opencode-ai/* workspace packages.
parseGitHubRemote() has zero production callers. Test imports from non-existent module path. @octokit/rest, @octokit/graphql, @octokit/webhooks-types declared but unused in packages/opencode/src/.

OAuth flows exist: MCP PKCE with local callback server on port 19876, Copilot device code flow, provider plugin OAuth. IPC uses contextBridge + ipcMain.handle pattern. Effect services follow well-documented pattern: Interface→Service→Layer. i18n uses @solid-primitives/i18n with 16 locales.
18 test files related to GitHub/repo/OAuth. Key findings: github-remote.test.ts has stale import path, no PR creation tests exist, no SDK tests, no GitHub API client tests, no e2e OAuth tests.
Active branch is dev (clean, no delta). Recent commits fold GitHub remote parsing into repository module. Octokit dependencies exist but are dead code in opencode package. SDK is auto-generated.

github/ package has full Octokit integration for GitHub Actions runner. packages/function/ has Cloudflare Worker with GitHub App token exchange. Desktop has 33 IPC channels, deep-link handler (reusable for OAuth callback). i18n/en.ts has 1020 lines with 16 locale mirrors.
